;;;45     void Debug_Log(const char *fmt, ...)

;;;46     {
;;;47         LogMsg_t item;

;;;52         len = vsnprintf(item.msg, LOG_MSG_MAX_LEN, fmt, args);

000014  1e04              SUBS     r4,r0,#0
;;;53         va_end(args);
;;;54     
;;;55         if (len <= 0) return;
000016  dd0b              BLE      |L2.48|
;;;56     
;;;57         /* 
;;;58          * If scheduler is not running yet, or queue is not initialized,
;;;59          * send directly to UART (blocking) so we don't lose early boot logs.
;;;60          */
;;;61         if (xTaskGetSchedulerState() != taskSCHEDULER_RUNNING || xLogQueue == NULL) {

;;;62             HAL_UART_Transmit(DEBUG_UART, (uint8_t*)item.msg, len, 100);
;;;63         } else {
;;;64             /* Push to queue - non-blocking */
;;;65             xQueueSend(xLogQueue, &item, 0);

;;;66         }
;;;67     }

                  StartLogTask PROC
;;;68

;;;71         LogMsg_t item;
